steps.title: Identify exponential growth structure
steps.content:
Exponential population growth follows $ A = P(1 + r)^t $, where
  • $ A = 60,000 $ (future population)
  • $ P = 48,000 $ (current population)
  • $ r = 4\% = 0.04 $
  • $ t $ = years
This matches structure 60,000 = 48,000(1.04)^t, which is choice D.
